message:
feat: add tiered scrollback storage for 200+ pane agent swarms (ft-1memj.19)

Three-tier scrollback (hot/warm/cold) with zstd compression for warm
pages and configurable eviction. 26 tests covering compression, tier
transitions, serde roundtrips, and 200-pane scale validation (<10MB).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
